ops.title: Fix flaky TestDriverStdinEOFAnyPhase in internal/codeexec
ops.description: CI `test (ubuntu-latest)` failed on `TestDriverStdinEOFAnyPhase` (`internal/codeexec`, `go test -race`) for docs-only commit e982fd5b32af (fragment migration — zero Go changes): https://github.com/yasyf/cc-context/actions/runs/29490239995. Parent commit ff0a6629 was green on the same workflow, and a `gh run rerun --failed` with no code change passed — a timing-sensitive flake, likely in the uv-subprocess driver's stdin-EOF handling under race-detector load. Reproduce with `go test -race -run TestDriverStdinEOFAnyPhase -count=50 ./internal/codeexec/` (or under `stress`) before fixing; per repo rules, isolate the failing schedule rather than padding sleeps.

ops.text: TestDriverStdinEOFAnyPhase passes 50+ consecutive -race runs locally (stress or -count)
root cause identified and stated in the closing comment (not just a retry/sleep)
